You will be tested on your skills in basic math, geometry, algebra, and data analysis, with an emphasis on applying these concepts to practical situations. This exam is for individuals who did not complete a traditional high school program but wish to earn a credential that is widely recognized by employers, colleges, and the military. Successfully passing this test demonstrates critical thinking and problem-solving abilities that are foundational for career advancement and further education.

title: ServSafe Food Handler Certification
description: The ServSafe Food Handler Certification exam is a foundational assessment of essential food safety knowledge for front-line employees in the foodservice industry. It tests a candidate's understanding of critical practices to prevent foodborne illness, focusing on the key responsibilities of any individual who handles, prepares, or serves food. The exam covers five core areas: basic food safety, personal hygiene, cross-contamination and allergens, time and temperature control, and cleaning and sanitation. It is designed for food workers in restaurants, retail food stores, cafeterias, and other establishments to ensure they possess the baseline knowledge required to perform their duties safely. Upon passing the exam, individuals earn a nationally recognized certification that validates their competency to employers and regulatory health inspectors, demonstrating a commitment to public health and operational excellence.

title: DMV Driving Permit Test
description: The DMV Driving Permit Test is a state-administered written examination that assesses an applicant's foundational knowledge of safe driving principles, traffic laws, and road signs. It is a mandatory step for all new drivers seeking a learner's permit, which legally allows them to practice driving under supervision. The exam evaluates comprehension of critical rules of the road, including right-of-way, speed limits, parking regulations, and the meaning of various highway signs, signals, and pavement markings. By passing this test, you demonstrate to the state licensing authority that you possess the essential theoretical knowledge required to begin behind-the-wheel training. Successfully completing this exam grants you a learner's permit, a crucial milestone on the path to becoming a licensed, independent driver.

title: SAT Math Practice
description: The SAT Math Practice Exam is a comprehensive 44-question assessment designed to mirror the content, structure, and rigor of the mathematics section of the official SAT. It evaluates a student's proficiency in core mathematical concepts essential for college readiness, including Algebra, Problem Solving and Data Analysis, and Advanced Math. This exam is ideal for high school students preparing for the SAT, individuals seeking to gauge their current math competency, or anyone looking to strengthen their quantitative reasoning skills under timed conditions. By taking this practice test, you will gain a clear understanding of your strengths and weaknesses, familiarize yourself with the question formats and pacing of the SAT, and develop critical problem-solving strategies. The results provide a diagnostic benchmark to focus your subsequent study efforts effectively.

title: Notary Public Exam
description: The Notary Public Exam is a state-administered assessment designed to certify an individual's knowledge and competency to perform notarial acts with accuracy and integrity. It tests a candidate's understanding of the laws, regulations, and ethical standards governing notaries public within a specific jurisdiction. The exam typically covers the proper procedures for administering oaths and affirmations, taking acknowledgments, executing jurats, identifying signers, maintaining a journal, and understanding the limitations of a notary's authority to prevent the unauthorized practice of law. It is a mandatory step for anyone seeking an official commission from their state government to serve as a public officer. By passing this exam, candidates demonstrate they are equipped to act as a trusted, impartial witness in legal and commercial transactions, thereby safeguarding the public from fraud and ensuring the authenticity of critical documents.

title: ServiceNow
description: Custom exam: ServiceNow
